title: M0348 Digestion Mixture
steps: DNA (5 ng–3 μg), 1–16 μl If the starting material is 100 ng or less, incubation times should be increased by 10 minutes.

10X Fragmentase Reaction Buffer v2, 2 μl undetermined The Fragmentase Reaction Buffer v2 now contains BSA, eliminating the need to add it separately. The buffer also has increased Mg++ which improves the uniformity of fragmentation across different conditions.
creator: New England   Biolabs
